name: Inflection Resources Ltd.
description: Inflection Resources Ltd. is a technically driven copper-gold exploration company focused on discovering Tier-1 deposits in Australia, where it is the largest single landholder in the Macquarie Arc of New South Wales with approximately 549,000 hectares of exploration licences and applications. The company is drilling multiple alkalic copper-gold porphyry targets across its New South Wales portfolio and has an exploration earn-in agreement with AngloGold Ashanti across several of its copper-gold projects. Additional exploration is conducted in the Northern Territory targeting iron oxide copper-gold (IOCG) style deposits.
